title: Nooby's Obsidian Options
body:
## About
An extremely simple pack switching the "options" menu background from dirt to Crying Obsidian for, in my opinion, a nicer look. This pack affects all GUI backgrounds excepting in-game inventories and the main menu panorama. 

I highly recommend using some sort of dark mode such as [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) (see Gallery) or [AquaHUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aquahud) to really bring out the most of this pack.

---

***Obsidian Options has been archived due to changes in the 1.21 update removing the options background.***
